burial.plot_notes: Conneautville Cemetery, Conneautville Crawford County PA — with husband Carmen and son Carl Arthur.

narrative_blocks.header: Survived only son by fifty-five years
narrative_blocks.body: Viola Adams Ellis lost her only son Carl Arthur at sixteen in 1965, then her husband Carmen in 1997 — twenty-three years before her own 2020 death. She lived ninety-three years and was buried at Conneautville Cemetery alongside both husband and son, fifty-five years after Carl's death.

burial.plot_notes: Conneautville Cemetery, Conneautville Crawford County PA — with husband Carmen and son Carl Arthur.

She lived ninety-three years and was buried at Conneautville Cemetery alongside both husband and son, fifty-five years after Carl's death.

burial.plot_notes: Conneautville Cemetery, Conneautville Crawford County PA — with parents John Clarence + Gertha, wife Viola, and son Carl Arthur.

military_service.notes: World War II veteran per FA 'Veteran' designation. Specific unit, rank, theater, and dates of service undocumented in available sources.

narrative_blocks.header: Lost only son Carl at sixteen in 1965
narrative_blocks.body: Carmen and his wife Viola lost their only documented son Carl Arthur Ellis at sixteen on January 31, 1965 — twenty-two days after Carl's sixteenth birthday. The cause of his death is not recorded, but the proximity to that birthday milestone suggests illness or accident. Carmen lived another thirty-two years before his own death in 1997.

narrative_blocks.header: WWII veteran, born year after sister's daughter
narrative_blocks.body: Carmen Ellis was born May 20, 1920 in Erie Pennsylvania, less than two years after the 1918 influenza pandemic killed his second cousin Elvira Unger at age two. He served in World War II. He lived his post-war life in Crawford County Pennsylvania and was buried at Conneautville Cemetery alongside parents, wife, and son.

bio.photo_notes: Portrait of Carl Arthur Ellis (1949-1965), who died twenty-two days after his sixteenth birthday.

burial.plot_notes: Conneautville Cemetery, Conneautville Crawford County PA — first family member buried there ahead of his parents.

narrative_blocks.header: Died twenty-two days after his sixteenth birthday
narrative_blocks.body: Carl Arthur Ellis was born January 9, 1949 and died January 31, 1965 at age sixteen — twenty-two days after his sixteenth birthday. The cause of death is not documented in available sources, but the proximity to the birthday suggests illness or accident close to that milestone. He was the only documented child of Carmen and Viola Ellis.

narrative_blocks.header: His grave anchored the family Conneautville plot
narrative_blocks.body: Carl was buried at Conneautville Cemetery in January 1965 — the first of his immediate family interred there. His father Carmen joined him thirty-two years later in 1997, his mother Viola fifty-five years later in 2020. The family plot effectively built itself around his early grave.

burialCemetery.name: Conneautville Cemetery
burialCemetery.notes: Conneautville Cemetery, Conneautville Crawford County PA. Burial site of John Clarence Ellis (HD4274, gen 8) and likely multiple Ellis descendants. Located in northwestern Crawford County, north of Meadville.
